title: The definitive set of Eva subs
display_title: The definitive set of Eva subs
wikitext:
[]: The definitive set of Eva subs?             Quote Post by Ghostman84 » Wed May 16, 2012 1:22 am I've scoured the web to no avail, and I knew you guys could point me in the right direction: Where can I download the best quality English Eva subs? I have MKV versions of Renewal (including the Director's Cut episodes) and was looking for a soft sub (like .srt format, or better yet the same file-type used on the DVDs) Please help!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 16, 2012 1:50 am For the TV series, probably ADV's Platinum DVD set subtitles, but for EoE, maybe the ZX fansub. Not sure where you can download them, you'll have to use google for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 16, 2012 3:53 pm For Renewal Feature Films I use the A2000A fansubs but I also have a copy of the Japanese Renewal Films DVD .

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Wed May 16, 2012 5:39 pm Get the BLOAT version. He has the best subs and video quality. He even fixed the crazy gate weave in Death and Rebirth.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue May 22, 2012 1:31 am In terms of accuracy, I'm told you can't get much better than the Platinum subs, but as I've expressed here before, I find those subs to be painfully dry as dialogue. I'm hoping that the inevitable Blu-Ray release however many years down the line will have a definitive set of subs.

I have MKV versions of Renewal (including the Director's Cut episodes) and was looking for a soft sub (like .srt format, or better yet the same file-type used on the DVDs)
